title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Finolex Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
